Class PackageLocker

java.lang.Object
com.amazingco.PickingPoint
com.amazingco.GroupablePoint
com.amazingco.PackageLocker
public class PackageLocker extends GroupablePoint
PackageLocker management system for Amazingco. Copyright 2023, Amazingco. All rights reserved. A PackageLocker is characterized by an identifier, a GPS location, an opening time, a capacity and an operative state. Each PackageLocker contains a variable number of lockers; AmazingCo employees place packages into empty lockers.

  • Constructor Details

    • PackageLocker

      public PackageLocker(String identifier, es.uva.inf.poo.maps.GPSCoordinate coordinates, LocalTime openingTime, Integer capacity)
      Constructor for PackageLocker.
      Parameters:
      identifier - String representing the package locker identifier
      coordinates - GPSCoordinate representing the locker location
      openingTime - LocalTime representing the locker opening time
      capacity - Integer representing the number of lockers

  • Method Details

    • addPackage

      public void addPackage(Package pkg, LocalDate deadline)
      Adds a package to this package locker with the provided expiry date.
      Specified by:
      addPackage in class GroupablePoint
      Parameters:
      pkg - Package to be added to the locker
      deadline - LocalDate representing the storage deadline for the package
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the package is null, certified, unpaid, the locker is not operative, the package was already picked up, the date is null, there is no space available, or a package with the same code already exists in the locker

    • removePackage

      public void removePackage(String packageCode, LocalDate currentDate)
      Removes the package identified by the given code, using the provided current date to determine overdue or return behavior.
      Specified by:
      removePackage in class GroupablePoint
      Parameters:
      packageCode - String representing the package code
      currentDate - LocalDate representing the current date for removal
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the locker is not operative, the package code is null, the package is not present, or the date is null

    • getOccupiedLockers

      public Integer getOccupiedLockers()
      Returns the number of occupied lockers.
      Returns:
      Integer representing the number of occupied lockers

    • getEmptyLockers

      public Integer getEmptyLockers()
      Returns the number of empty lockers.
      Returns:
      Integer representing the number of empty lockers

    • setCapacity

      public void setCapacity(Integer capacity)
      Sets the capacity (number of lockers) for this PackageLocker.
      Specified by:
      setCapacity in class GroupablePoint
      Parameters:
      capacity - Integer representing the number of lockers
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if capacity is null, negative, or less than the current number of occupied lockers

    • isSpaceAvailable

      public Boolean isSpaceAvailable()
      Returns true if there is available space, false otherwise.
      Specified by:
      isSpaceAvailable in class PickingPoint
      Returns:
      Boolean indicating availability

    • getPackageInLocker

      public Package getPackageInLocker(String packageCode)
      Returns the package stored in the locker matching the provided code.
      Specified by:
      getPackageInLocker in class GroupablePoint
      Parameters:
      packageCode - String representing the package code
      Returns:
      the Package stored in the locker matching the given code, or null if not found

    • isEligible

      public Boolean isEligible()
      Returns whether this package locker is eligible for a given package.
      Returns:
      Boolean indicating eligibility

    • setEligible

      protected void setEligible(Boolean eligible)
      Sets the eligibility flag for this locker.
      Parameters:
      eligible - Boolean indicating eligibility
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if elegible is null

    • isCertified

      public Boolean isCertified()
      Description copied from class: PickingPoint
      Returns whether this picking point accepts certified deliveries.
      Specified by:
      isCertified in class PickingPoint
      Returns:
      always false, since package lockers do not accept certified deliveries

    • isCashOnDelivery

      public Boolean isCashOnDelivery()
      Description copied from class: PickingPoint
      Returns whether this picking point accepts cash-on-delivery packages.
      Specified by:
      isCashOnDelivery in class PickingPoint
      Returns:
      always false, since package lockers do not accept cash-on-delivery
